prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-ROBOTDINO-WHT-CPC-AMZ Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Futuristic Robot Fantasy Dragon Space Toy with Lights and Sounds Boys Ages 3 and Up Description: This Kidplokio Dinosaur Robot T-Rex Toy with Lights and Sounds will leave all other dinosaur toys trembling in their wake. With loud realistic roars, bright LED lights, as well as prehistoric stomps, this futuristic dinosaur robot walks all by itself with no assistance or remote control.

Perfect for any futuristic Jurassic journey into make-believe. The simple, easy-to-use design of the dinosaur robot allows toddlers and kids to engage with their prehistoric pal as it moves forward unassisted, for endless hours of pretend play fun. The t-rex toys move easily across smooth surfaces with rollers under its tail and both feet, and feature stunning LED lights that illuminate in colors red, blue and green within the dinosaur's eyes and mouth, making playtime even more fun and realistic.

Not only will your little paleontologist be thrilled and occupied for hours with this mechanical, light-up walking tyrannosaurus rex dinosaur robot from Kidplokio, but toddlers will also be engaging in important early educational growth, like working fine and gross motor skills, as well as improving cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions. Search Terms: toys for boys birthday present for boys gifts for brothers robot toys dinosaurs toys space toys dino cosplay interactive walking toys tyrannosaurus rex holiday toy list 2023 playroom playset paleontology for kids toddlers dragon toys pretend play Features: - DRAGON ROBOT TOYS: This futuristic robot dinosaur from Kidplokio walks all by itself and comes with captivating lights and sounds too to make playtime even more fun and realistic! The t-rex toy quickly moves across smooth surfaces with rollers under its tail and feet - AWESOME LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Kidplokio's walking Space Robot Dinosaur comes with lifelike stomping sounds and bright flashing LED lights that illuminate in the colors, red, blue, and green inside the dinosaur's eyes and mouth; When activated this fearsome apex predator strikes fear into anything nearby with its ferocious roar! - PRETEND PLAY: Perfect for any futuristic Jurassic journey into make-believe! The simple, easy-to-use design of the futuristic dinosaur robot allows toddlers and kids to engage with their prehistoric pal, as it moves forward unassisted to the next adventure! Batteries not included - CHILD DEVELOPMENT: Not only will your little paleontologist be thrilled and occupied for hours with these walking, light-up t-rex toys, but toddlers will also be engaging in important early educational growth, like working fine and gross motor skills, as well as improving cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 14.5 x 9.75 x 4 inches; Weight: 1.20lbs; Batteries: x2 AA Batteries Not Included; Colors: White or Green; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio White Robot Dinosaur T-Rex Toy with Lights
